name: finals-review-assistant
description: Local, course-scoped AI review workspace with traceable Q&A, homework solving, practice grading, and study progress.

scripts.dev:api: uv run --project apps/api uvicorn review_assistant.main:app --app-dir apps/api/src --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.db:upgrade: uv run --project apps/api python -m alembic -c apps/api/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.db:status: uv run --project apps/api python -m alembic -c apps/api/alembic.ini current
scripts.test:api: uv run --project apps/api python -m pytest -c apps/api/pyproject.toml apps/api/tests
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run test:web
scripts.check: npm run test && npm run typecheck:web && npm run build:web
